author: jasonsutter87
summary: Valid identification of a god-function anti-pattern in do_run_batches (358 lines, 20 params, 16 _fn callbacks) and systemic callback-explosion across the codebase. Numeric claims are mostly accurate. Earliest submission on this topic. Caveats: the _fn injection pattern is a deliberate testability design choice, not accidental; the issue is maintainability friction, not a defect.
